description.en: A NamedNodeMap of attribute objects. Only elements have actual values for this; others provide None for this attribute. This is a read-only attribute.

excerpt.es: A NamedNodeMap of attribute objects. Only elements have actual values for this; others provide None for this attribute. This is a read-only attribute.
excerpt.en: A NamedNodeMap of attribute objects. Only elements have actual values for this; others provide None for this attribute. This is a read-only attribute.

description.en: Add a new child node to this node at the end of the list of children, returning newChild. If the node was already in the tree, it is removed first.

excerpt.es: Add a new child node to this node at the end of the list of children, returning newChild. If the node was already in the tree, it is removed first.
excerpt.en: Add a new child node to this node at the end of the list of children, returning newChild. If the node was already in the tree, it is removed first.
